noveltyJustification: Mapped credible native features into one pure-core/napi boundary under the existing TypeScript adapter and exposed ANN's parity conflict.

summary: Use a pure inference/vector core with one thin napi-rs adapter; TypeScript retains all behavior and persistence authority.
Ship the Node ONNX/Sharp fallback first and make it the pinned byte oracle for the later Rust path.
Strict whole-result byte parity may prohibit approximate ANN unless the same engine/index runs in fallback or policy defines a separate contract.
